suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make browser testing conditional in the frontend-worker skill for changes that don't affect visible UI behavior (e.g., enum value fixes that only change form option values). For form value-only changes that pass build+typecheck, browser testing adds minimal value.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-dashboard-category-enum involved changing category option values from kebab-case to title-case. Browser testing was prescribed but added no additional signal beyond build+typecheck passing.

rejectedObservations.observation: PRODUCT_CATEGORIES list duplicated in create.ts and update.ts — a shared constant would be safer.
rejectedObservations.reason: Pre-existing pattern not introduced by this milestone. Out of scope for misc-hardening-fixes. Could be a future improvement but not a shared state update.
